summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a rare 1967 performance, highlighted by a beautiful Golden Road.
review: The recording is praised as the best‑sounding version of this early Summer of Love show, offering crystal‑clear audio that lets the band’s evolving psychedelic edge shine through. Reviewers note the set is musically beautiful and historic, with Golden Road standing out as a highlight. Overall it delivers both high‑quality sound and an inspiring performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review, but it rates the show and recording at the top of its class; the weighting gives a high overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review calls it the best‑sounding version of this era, indicating crystal‑clear, well‑balanced audio despite the 1967 source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A vibrant early‑Summer‑of‑Love set that showcases the band’s evolving psychedelic sound and historic significance.
